events.text: New 112GB SSD mounted at /data on GPU server
Router config populated with 14 real models

critical_lessons.text: Never commit plaintext credentials — encrypt first, gitignore plaintext
Use SSH keys for git remotes, not PATs in URLs
When given trust + autonomy, ship faster
If coder+QA sub-agents > Opus solo cost, just use Opus
Batch periodic checks into heartbeat instead of many cron jobs
Test locally before pushing to CI — Bowen explicit
Coverage threshold 85% minimum, 90% ideal — Bowen explicit
Use uv not pip on GPU server — Bowen explicit
Eat your own dogfood — use skills you build
